title: scrophularia grandiflora subsp. grandiflora
intro: Scrophularia grandiflora subsp. grandiflora, also known as the greater figwort or large figwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Scrophularia grandiflora subsp. grandiflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various ailments.
